fields.name: Distance Attenuation End:#Radius or size of light
Camera Distance Fade Start:#Distance at which we start to fade out this light
Camera Distance Fade End:#Distance at which the light should be completely faded out and not seen
Inner Cone Angle:[0-160 degrees]#Inner hotspot attenuation end.
Outer Cone End:[0-160 degrees]#Angle size of spotlight.
Cone Projection Shape:#Use cone in all cases unless you have a gobo you need to project, frustum uses the full clip area of the light
Cinema Objects Only#This should only be turned on if you have light linking data correctly setup
Gobo Tag Path:#Bitmap file for spotlight. Cube map for point light. Gobo bitmap must be synced to xbox.
Aspect Ratio:[-0-1+]#Shape length and width of Gobo.
Tile Behavior:#Gobo texture lookup behavior when tiled.
destroy light after:seconds#automatically destroys the light after it has existed this long (0 to disable)

options: render first person only#only render when camera is 1st person
render third person only#don't render when camera is 1st person
dont render splitscreen#no rendering this light in splitscreen mode
render while active camo#keep rendering this light when the attached player goes camo
render in multiplayer override#overrides game settings that disable dynamic lights
move to camera in first person#moves the light to match the camera
never priority cull#never cull this light because of low priority
screenspace specular lighting#uses expensive specular lighting on screenspace lights
always on for weapon#even it is dropped
